title: Valve launches Steam Machine with prices over $1,000
summary: Valve's device for PC gaming in the living room hits the market with a high price and promises support for FSR 4.

title: CD Projekt Red admits its reputation has not yet recovered from the launch of Cyberpunk 2077
summary: Company executives acknowledge losing player trust and seek to regain it with future titles.

title: Hideo Kojima reveals new images of his horror game OD reminiscent of P.T.
summary: The Japanese creator shares details of his next Xbox exclusive, generating excitement among horror fans.

title: Netflix and Aardman prepare a stop-motion animated Pokémon series
summary: The series produced by the Wallace and Gromit studio will be set in an iconic region and premiere next year.

title: Fan remake project of Zelda: Ocarina of Time canceled over fears of Nintendo
summary: After a decade of work, developers end the unofficial project following the Japanese company's announcement.

title: EA conducts new layoffs in recruitment, support, and security ahead of a possible sale
summary: The company reduces its workforce in several areas while it is reported that it is preparing its sale to Saudi Arabia for $55 billion.

title: GTA 6 fans analyze every detail amid rumors of prices and reflections
summary: The community closely follows any information about the next Rockstar game, while insiders deny leaks.

title: Microsoft announces live-action Sea of Thieves movie with a Marvel actor
summary: The pirate video game will hit the big screen as part of Xbox's expansion into film and television.

title: Reviving The Last of Us Part 2's multiplayer on PC through a mod
summary: A group of fans is developing an unofficial multiplayer version that will arrive this year, although only for PC.

title: Fellowship receives a massive patch to improve its cooperative experience
summary: The early access dungeon RPG seeks to attract more players with over 2,000 changes and MMO-like content.

title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in a plane accident
summary: The executive and co-founder of the French video game company died in a tragic small plane accident.

title: Gears of War E-Day brings back cooperative mode and promises to be like Saving Private Ryan
summary: The next title in the saga will return to its roots with a grittier campaign and the return of multiplayer.

title: Warframe developers lament the end of Destiny 2 and warn that the genre weakens
summary: The creators of the popular action game express their sadness over the demise of Destiny 2 and its impact on the games-as-a-service genre.

title: House of the Dragon season 3 sparks controversy with a dialogue that divides fans
summary: A specific line from the first episode has been criticized by followers of the series, generating debate on social media.

title: Fortnite launches new event, skins, and OG season with multiple novelties
summary: The popular battle royale continues to update with varied content, from celebrity skins to themed events.

title: Call of Duty Season 4 Reloaded includes Nicolas Cage and a new Zombies map
summary: The new Call of Duty update brings a Nicolas Cage skin and the Kowakujō map with a secret weapon.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved will not require PS Plus and the ring design in the remake draws criticism
summary: Two news about Halo: the remastered version of the ring is compared unfavorably to the original and it is confirmed that it will not require a subscription for cooperative mode.

title: Meccha Chameleon, the indie hide-and-seek game, sweeps sales in just two weeks
summary: The peculiar game of concealment and camouflage has become a sales phenomenon with a unique artistic proposal.

title: Guild Wars announces a second installment in the same month, surprising fans
summary: The developers of Guild Wars present a new title in the franchise, while reflecting on its legacy in the MMO genre.

title: Capcom will hold a Spotlight event this week with news and a trailer
summary: The Japanese company announces a presentation for June 25 where it will showcase its upcoming releases.
